name: Bullet Bros
author: Poki
description: Bullet Bros is the thrilling sequel to the funny platform game Flip Bros. This time, you're armed with a powerful gun that adds a whole new dimension to the gameplay. Use the recoil from your shots to propel yourself through the air, rotate, and shoot your enemies into oblivion! The more you play, the more cool outfits and powerful guns you can unlock! Think you've got what it takes? Gear up and get ready to blast off! How to play Bullet Bros? To jump and rotate, hold the mouse or space bar; release it to shoot. Who created Bullet Bros? Bullet Bros is created by GameTornado. Play their other games on Poki: Short Life , Short Life 2 , Poor Eddie , Dreadhead Parkour , Flip Bros , Eugene's Life and Mini Train ! How can I play Bullet Bros for free? You can play Bullet Bros for free on Poki. Can I play Bullet Bros on mobile devices and desktop? Bullet Bros can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
